full_text:
Zuoxiao [Enclosure of the Left]
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zuoxiao [Enclosure of the Left]. Killed by Yuan Shao. Name means Enclosure of the Left, referring to the office in charge of convict labourers. Zuoxiao [Enclosure of the Left] was a bandit Zuoxiao [Enclosure of the Left] lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
